---
title: "Presentation at FOSS4G 2013"
date: 2013-09-22
categories: [event]
tags: [FOSS4G, conference, visualization]
description: "Presented at FOSS4G 2013 conference"
---

I presented at FOSS4G 2013, THE conference for Free Open Source Software for Geospatial applications.

The conference was in Nottingham with hundreds of delegates. I presented on visualisation.

FOSS4G is a great conference for anyone interested in open source geospatial tools - highly recommended!
